metadata.basis: P2-1 RED fixture from Trial-4 slide-01 evidence; visual shows a building photo plus $4.5T, 74%, and 3x stat callouts while narration invents a $5.2 trillion upward line and paired bars.

narration_segments.text: On the left, the upward line toward $5.2 trillion in 2024 shows the cost curve. On the right, the paired bars contrast independent practice with hospital employment.

perception_artifacts.extracted_text: $4.5T Annual U.S. Health Spend. 74% Physicians in Employment. 3x Admin Cost Growth.
perception_artifacts.layout_description: Building photo on the left with three stat callouts on the right.
